title: Calendar View - View a date range

posts.author: mattbr (Matt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Currently the calendar view only allows month, week and day views.
As a marketing company we use the calendar to view dates of activities that are coming up, these dates are often moved around in this view and you will only see the first week of the next month if the last day(s) of the current month fall at the beginning of the week.

It would be good to have a view that was say next four weeks, this way you will see the current week and the next three/four after that.

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mattbr,

Voted for your request. Monday’s calendar can use some improvements!

Would a view like this be helpful? It shows events across months.

We developed Calendar Plus as a native calendar replacement. It supports event durations, and displaying extra information from items on the calendar items.

We can consider adding this view if you’re interested.
